safety_tips.tip: Removing footwear before entering temples/homes is customary
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Avoid loud conversation inside temples or wildlife parks
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Ask permission before photographing local people
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Wear comfortable walking shoes — ruins involve uneven terrain
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Sandhya_All Inclusive Guide- Hampi.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Carry a hat, sunglasses, and sunscreen; Hampi is warm and open
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Sandhya_All Inclusive Guide- Hampi.pdf
Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Sandhya_All Inclusive Guide- Hampi.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Start early to enjoy monuments in pleasant morning light
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Sandhya_All Inclusive Guide- Hampi.pdf

safety_tips.tip: ATMs are limited around Hampi; carry some cash for entrances and small shops
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Sandhya_All Inclusive Guide- Hampi.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Photography is allowed in most places, but flash is restricted in some temples
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Sandhya_All Inclusive Guide- Hampi.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Wildlife viewing should always be done silently and without flash
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

health_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Stay hydrated — weather is cool but can be dry
health_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Avoid eating cut fruits from roadside vendors
health_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Wear full sleeves for nature walks & safaris
health_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf
Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Hampi - All Inclusive Guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Weather will be max 32 degrees and minimum 22 degrees - carry sunscreen and protective hat/cap for sun protection
health_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Hampi - All Inclusive Guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Keep mosquito repellent handy, especially in Kabini
health_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Priya_All Inclusive Guide.pdf
